title: plocama puberula
intro: Plocama puberula is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the scrub orange or hairy plocama. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plocama puberula include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive problems, and treat skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Plocama puberula can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
